raw.message: Experience the full power of combat robots!

hook.summary: Intense mech combat with heavy gunfire and explosions.
hook.visual_action: A large mech is firing multiple weapons at enemy mechs in a futuristic, lunar-like environment.

scene_flow: Mech engages multiple enemies with heavy artillery in a lunar base setting.
Close-up of the mech's weapons firing and hitting targets with sparks and smoke.
The mech continues to advance while taking fire and destroying enemies.
Transition to a black screen with 'START NOW!' text and fire sparks.
audience_proxy: Male gamers aged 18-35 who enjoy tactical combat and sci-fi machinery.
